stable_authority.condition: epsilon low; DeltaPhi down; editability preserved

rigid_authority_closure_precursor.condition: epsilon up but tau suppressed or reframed; D_A up

innovative_reopening.condition: tau accepted; DeltaPhi up; alternatives computed
innovative_reopening.result: short-term instability tolerated for route re-computation

suppressed_innovation.result: misfit accumulates; long-term collapse risk increases

coupled_regime_shift.condition: one side's rigidity or re-opening propagates
